query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN website != '' AND website IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_website,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phone != '' AND phone IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_phone,
  SUM(CASE WHEN grantEmail != '' AND grantEmail IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN amount != '' AND amount IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_amount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(description) > 50 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_good_desc,
  SUM(CASE WHEN applicationProcess IS NOT NULL AND applicationProcess != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_app_process,
  SUM(CASE WHEN targetDiagnosis IS NOT NULL AND targetDiagnosis != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_diagnosis,
  SUM(CASE WHEN b2VisaEligible IS NOT NULL AND b2VisaEligible != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_b2visa
FROM grants WHERE isActive = 1;

  SUM(CASE WHEN b2VisaEligible IS NOT NULL AND b2VisaEligible != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_b2visa
FROM grants WHERE isActive = 1;
